author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

June Atlas Brew Schedule!

  June Schedule:
• Game Structure - Gameplay Ability System possibilities with gameplay engineer, @MagicPuncher (June 7)
• Economics - Secret (June 14)
• Politics - Secret (June 21)
• Community Updates and Freestyle (June 28)

  What is the Atlas Brew?
The Atlas Brew is a weekly community gathering, held on Wednesdays, where we discuss your favorite Star Atlas topics and have fun! We take notes during the Atlas Brew and give them to the team, so your voice matters!

The events are live now at the top left of the server, if you'd like to hit the "interested" button to be notified when we're live!

Mentions: @MagicPuncher
